blockingIssues.description: Known-contact overlay rendering does not include required relationship context fields (e.g., relationship status/last interaction), so VAL-EXT-013 behavior is not met.
Duplicate LinkedIn URL detection only queries the first 100 contacts (`LOOKUP_PAGE_LIMIT = 100`), allowing duplicates beyond page 1.
Request Intro path checks depend on `currentUser.contactId`, but `PublicUser` does not expose `contactId`, so intro-path gating can stay disabled for normal authenticated users.
LinkedIn SPA stale-profile race can still occur because same-URL suppression in detector evaluation can skip re-entry after early route change detection, leaving stale extracted profile data.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify and enforce a single mission repo root for shared-state files so worker startup references (`services.yaml`, `library/`) do not mix org-planner and relay contexts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple review reports observed mission guidance targeting relay while repo-root shared-state files in this worker context describe org-planner, causing recurring setup ambiguity.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update `extension-worker` procedure to reference only guaranteed existing context files and tighten procedure checks for tests-first ordering before allowing `followedProcedure=true`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewers repeatedly reported missing required reference docs and transcript ordering drift where implementation edits preceded tests while handoff still claimed procedure compliance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reconcile VAL-EXT-013 lookup expectations with implementation strategy (dedicated `linkedinUrl` query endpoint vs paginated client-side scan) and document required contract surface explicitly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review reported contract expectation for direct linkedinUrl lookup while implementation uses limited-page contact fetch + local filtering, producing functional gaps and unclear acceptance criteria.

rejectedObservations.observation: Immediately update org-planner .factory/services.yaml with relay service commands.
Treat manifest `default_popup` conflict from `extension-sidepanel-and-web-detection` as an active blocker in current head state.
